channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Despite Promise To Be Pro-Life ‘Ally,’ Trump Admin Won’t Regulate Abortion Drug Endangering Women
item.description: The FDA appears to be slow-walking its mifepristone review, frustrating Trump allies in both Congress and pro-life states.

item.title: Jack Hughes or Eileen Gu?
item.description: Is loyalty to country a matter of choice, or an unalterable commitment?

item.title: Democrats dare again to dream in Texas' U.S. Senate race
item.description: The last time a Democrat won statewide in Texas was in 1994. Jeff Bezos was just launching Amazon. The sitcom "Friends" was brand new. The image of O....

item.title: Trump sues N.J. Gov. Mikie Sherill over new sanctuary policy
item.description: The Trump administration has sued to try to stop New Jersey Gov. Mikie Sherill's new sanctuary policy that bars federal officers from staging on state...

item.title: Hockey Loss Should Awaken Canada To Its Long-Running Anti-American Decline
item.description: Canada lost to the United States on the largest stage and in the one domain in which its superiority felt metaphysically guaranteed.

item.title: The Duty to Say What the Law Is
item.description: February 24 is not merely an anniversary. It is a reminder that constitutional structure endures only if it is defended.

item.title: Maryland Delegate Nicole Williams running to replace Rep. Steny H. Hoyer
item.description: Maryland state Delegate Nicole Williams has announced her candidacy to succeed Rep. Steny H. Hoyer after his 46-year tenure in representing the state'...

item.title: New York Democrats Demand ID To Shovel Snow But Not To Vote
item.description: A new Heritage Action poll further confirms voters' overwhelming support for proof of citizenship and ID to vote.

item.title: Parade of victims: Democrats invite Epstein survivors, deportation targets as foils to Trump speech
item.description: As President Trump surveys his audience at the U.S. Capitol on Tuesday night, he'll see some friends in the gallery -- but also plenty of opponents, i...

item.title: Supreme Court Tariff Ruling May Not Be Good News for China
item.description: In the long run, the reaffirmation of American constitutional governance could strengthen U.S. alliances.

item.title: Obtuse GOP Politicians Are Pretending The Courts Will Save Us
item.description: There is no evidence of any kind that Supreme Court rulings will stop government from continuing to get much bigger. This kind of make-believe is fata...

item.title: Viewer's guide to President Trump's 2026 State of the Union: How to watch and what to listen for
item.description: President Trump will deliver the first formal State of the Union address of his second term tonight before a joint session of Congress at the U.S. Cap...

item.title: Europe’s War on Digital Speech
item.description: The continent should back down on its overregulation of innovative tech companies.

item.title: Gavin Newsom Is Playing A ‘Trump’ Character He Doesn’t Understand
item.description: Newsom and his communications team see the form: Trump insults people and he's rude, so he won the presidency, so being rude and insulting wins the pr...
